snps.effect_template: LRP5 A1330V variant. Reduces Wnt signaling and bone mineral density.
Lactase non-persistence indirectly affects calcium absorption from dairy, modestly increasing osteoporosis risk.

recommendation_template: Ensure adequate calcium (1000-1200mg/day) and vitamin D (40-60 ng/mL). Weight-bearing exercise builds bone density. Consider DEXA scan after age 50 if risk factors present.

studies.title: Large-scale analysis of association between LRP5 and LRP6 variants and osteoporosis
studies.finding: LRP5 rs3736228 T allele associated with reduced BMD and fracture risk (OR=1.3)
